General.Name: Santech Holdings Limited
General.Description: Santech Holdings Limited a technology company, develops early-stage technology businesses. It provides client referral services to external financial product partners. The company also offers insurance products which includes life insurance products, such as individual whole life, term life, health insurance, and universal life insurance; annuity insurance products; and critical illness insurance products, including personal accident insurance products. The company was formerly known as Hywin Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to Santech Holdings Limited in July 2024. Santech Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Santech Holdings Limited  operates as a subsidiary of Carmel Holdings Limited.
